## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 System Information
- macOS Version: [e.g. 14.0 Sonoma]
- Mac Model: [e.g. M2 MacBook Pro]
- FFmpeg Version: [output of `./bin/ffmpeg -version`]

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Run command: `./bin/ffmpeg ...`
2. See error...

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## 📝 Logs
```
Paste any relevant log output here
```

## 📹 Sample Files (if applicable)
If relevant, provide sample video files that demonstrate the issue.

## 💡 Additional Context
Any other context about the problem here.
